---
title: "Diabétologie"
---

## SFD — Recommandations {#sfd .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil" id="sfd">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.sfdiabete.org/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/sfd.png" alt="SFD — Recommandations">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.sfdiabete.org/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">SFD — Recommandations</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Société Francophone du Diabète
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```
